articles.description: Motorola wins in battery size and charging speed, but still hasn't improved the software update situation.
articles.content: But the Flip one-ups the Razr with even thinner bezels on the cover screen for a truly futuristic appearance. The Samsung flip phone also improves in a few other areas, including adding support for S… [+10594 chars]
